title: Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs * Diabetes - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs * Diabetes 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Blindness Diabetes Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MUTUAL AID DIABETES MUTUAL AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with acquiring insulin or diabetes supplies (injection supplies, home glucose monitoring systems, etc.), obtaining or renewing prescriptions, accessing health insurance or resolving issues with health insurance companies, peer support, and navigating diabetes resources. May provide limited financial assistance with copays and telehealth appointments to obtain prescriptions. Also accepts donations of diabetic supplies by connecting people with extra supplies to those in need in their area. Website Eligibility: Individuals affected by diabetes Hours: Not applicable Email (646) 780-9571 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
